name: coprod_binding_init_exp012
hypothesis: Phase-2 mechanism variant: the coproduct key->value binding channel starts OFF at init (coprod_mix_qk/v = 0, dense-only) and must be turned on by gradients that barely flow while the dense path already satisfies the format shortcut. Initing coprod_mix_qk/v to 0.1 puts the bilinear binding partially ON from the start so it gets gradient — a coproduct-wiring init change, true to GDN3 math, forward-only. If retrieval emerges past ~0.30, binding strength was the gate; if not, the bottleneck is the read/router.
